name: digital-tattoo
description: DIGITAL TATTOO — offline in-browser multi-agent interrogation game with WebLLM (inference only)

scripts.prepare-publish: npm install && npm run fetch-model && npm run verify-models && npm run build && npm run verify-models -- dist
scripts.prepare-publish:all: npm install && npm run fetch-model:all && npm run verify-models && npm run build && npm run verify-models -- dist
